speaker: MATT
raw_text: Which is a good thing. But regardless, I would like you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would probably be about there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You were on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had my boots on, so I was up by his face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so we'll put you there. Oh god. Here you go. Grog was by the smelter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I had been looking at the thing. The big empty pyramid triangle thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you'd be over in this area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I was with Vex, maybe on the other side. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was on my broom, because I had been hovering looking at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough. So you'd probably be about--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: About there, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know that I had just poofed the wings out and I think I was inspecting one of the big metal men before it came out of the wall. I don't really remember which.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Most likely one of the ones that was not attended by another member of the party. So we'll say about here. And Scanlan, whereabouts were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know, near things. Can't really see too well, so put me where-- Let's see. I was at the door when we opened it and then I was beautiful. And now I'm not as beautiful. So put me near the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Near the door? So we'll put you over in this one here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So all of their faces are indented?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, each one of them, as opposed to the other warriors you saw in the chambers that led down into this area, have no faces. Instead where you see are an empty void triangular like the large seal, but vacuous.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But matches the same shape?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They didn't Man-E-Faces around? I'm misremembering that? Maybe I just really like Man-E-Faces.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, then. So last we left off, you had made your way into the chamber that holds the Core Anvil beneath the underwater volcano of Scaldseat. Upon approaching the central risen platform where the anvil was, some stone-built guardian that loomed over it, upon approaching and testing the boundaries, an unintentional firing of an arrow in the vicinity seemed to have triggered an aggressive stance, and the entity seems to be on the assault. So now, with the chamber there before you, I would like you all to take stock on your current positions and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's all right. We did our due diligence. We poked it and we prodded it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a big package going out to a bunch of folks there. It's the complete black poisonwood set, which is awesome. It's the tray, the vault, the dice tower. Oh god, it's all falling. It might be a little broken; I apologize in advance.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It smells of coffee.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Exactly. That's what it looks like. It's going to be signed by the cast for you. So to be entered in that giveaway, come into the Twitch chat over the break, and the keyword is going to be tarot. T-A-R-O-T. So yeah, we'll all be back here in a few minutes, guys. Enjoy your break, and we'll see you in a minute. [break]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello everyone, and welcome back to Critical Role. So! First and foremost, our winner in the chat of the awesome collection of various Wyrmwood collectables is ProfessorJedi. Congratulations, ProfessorJedi. Danoba will contact you and get your information to get those to you ASAP. So congrats.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also, I've been flooded with tweets on where I got this shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's the best shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I was wearing it yesterday.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You were wearing it yesterday. The amazing Whitney Moore made it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This very shirt? This one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A more masculine cut of this exact shirt. Not that exact shirt, but another one very similar to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Although we do have a few shirts that we share and trade off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tell us where to get it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For Human Peoples! I just tweeted it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You can get a pin, you can get a hoodie, you can get any form you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know you, so I'll ask you later, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay.
